Click here for only slugcats version

English isn't my first language, sorry for my gromar. You can copy my bot and change it by murderering characters to PUT THEIR SKIN ON YOURSELF aka chat as them, add new characters and edit the starting message!

Just don't forget to add a link to this bot if you're going to make it public...

Have fun I guess, and thanks for 420 chats! (And for 4.2k messages)

Heavily inspired by this cool bot made by Speegy

My original idea was to make a Saint POV of slugcat sleepover(Link above) for personal use, but I decided to make a remake with my headcanons or whatever this called.

I didn't got any permission from Speegy or original author from the pits of hell called Character AI which is poop compared to Janitor, if they'll ask me to remove the bot I will do that(probably, the bot)
